title: Muscarella tempestalis
taxonomy: Muscarella tempestalis is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Muscarella and is a type of epiphytic orchid. The genus Muscarella is part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and genetic analysis. Further research may provide more specific classification details.
uses: Muscarella tempestalis is an orchid species native to the Americas. However, information on its specific medicinal uses is limited.
